function 65
func:
const europeanCapitalCities = [
  "Tirana", "Andorra la Vella", "Yerevan", "Vienna", "Baku", "Minsk", "Brussels", "Sarajevo", "Sofia", "Zagreb",
  "Nicosia", "Prague", "Copenhagen", "Tallinn", "Helsinki", "Paris", "Tbilisi", "Berlin", "Athens", "Budapest",
  "Reykjavik", "Dublin", "Rome", "Astana", "Pristina", "Riga", "Vaduz", "Vilnius", "Luxembourg", "Skopje", "Valletta",
  "Chisinau", "Monaco", "Podgorica", "Amsterdam", "Oslo", "Warsaw", "Lisbon", "Bucharest", "Moscow", "San Marino",
  "Belgrade", "Bratislava", "Ljubljana", "Madrid", "Stockholm", "Bern", "Ankara", "Kyiv", "London", "Vatican City"
];

for (let i = 0; i < europeanCapitalCities.length; i++) {
    msg.payload = 
        [
        {
            "id": "411c41eeac91aa99",
            "type": "amqp-in",
            "z": "e8c09f7be029a19b",
            "name": "",
            "broker": "0a22328665886c31",
            "prefetch": 0,
            "noAck": true,
            "exchangeName": "thesis",
            "exchangeType": "topic",
            "exchangeRoutingKey": europeanCapitalCities[i],
            "exchangeDurable": true,
            "queueName": "",
            "queueExclusive": true,
            "queueDurable": false,
            "queueAutoDelete": true,
            "headers": "{}",
            "x": 130,
            "y": 1240,
            "wires": [
                [
                    "dd57fb9cf9a53df3"
                ]
            ]
        },
        {
            "id": "0a22328665886c31",
            "type": "amqp-broker",
            "name": "thesis",
            "host": "localhost",
            "port": "5672",
            "vhost": "",
            "tls": false,
            "credsFromSettings": false
        }
    ];
    
    node.send(msg);
}
